'''âsh-m-z-l''' ('''kashamzeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exhilarate|exhilarate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exhilarate|exhilarate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-m-z-l
|-
! Lemma
| kashamzeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishamzeloko|thishamzeloko]] || [[word:jishamzeloko|jishamzeloko]] || [[word:shishamzeloko|shishamzeloko]] || [[word:kishamzeloko|kishamzeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushamzeloko|thuthushamzeloko]] || [[word:jujushamzeloko|jujushamzeloko]] || [[word:shushushamzeloko|shushushamzeloko]] || [[word:kukushamzeloko|kukushamzeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushamzeloko|thushamzeloko]] || [[word:jushamzeloko|jushamzeloko]] || [[word:shushamzeloko|shushamzeloko]] || [[word:kushamzeloko|kushamzeloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshamzeloko|thoshamzeloko]] || [[word:joshamzeloko|joshamzeloko]] || [[word:shoshamzeloko|shoshamzeloko]] || [[word:koshamzeloko|koshamzeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshamzeloko|thĂŠshamzeloko]] || [[word:jĂŠshamzeloko|jĂŠshamzeloko]] || [[word:shĂŠshamzeloko|shĂŠshamzeloko]] || [[word:kĂŠshamzeloko|kĂŠshamzeloko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashamzeloko|thashamzeloko]] || [[word:jashamzeloko|jashamzeloko]] || [[word:shashamzeloko|shashamzeloko]] || [[word:kashamzeloko|kashamzeloko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
